parsedContent.title: Financial Statement Preparation and Analysis
parsedContent.description: Prepare financial statements and analyze financial data

sections.name: A
sections.title: Financial Statement Preparation (40 Marks)
sections.description: Prepare income statement and statement of financial position

questions.text: Preparation of Income Statement and Statement of Financial Position

subQuestions.label: a)
subQuestions.text: Prepare the income statement for the year ended 31 December 2025
subQuestions.correctAnswer: Sales Revenue: 20,000,000, Cost of Goods Sold: 9,000,000, Gross Profit: 11,000,000, Operating Expenses: 4,700,000, Net Profit: 6,300,000

subQuestions.label: b)
subQuestions.text: Prepare the statement of financial position as at 31 December 2025
subQuestions.correctAnswer: Current Assets: 13,000,000, Non-current Assets: 8,800,000, Total Assets: 21,800,000, Equity: 21,300,000, Current Liabilities: 3,000,000, Total Equity and Liabilities: 24,300,000

questions.correctAnswer: a) Sales Revenue: 20,000,000, Cost of Goods Sold: 9,000,000, Gross Profit: 11,000,000, Operating Expenses: 4,700,000, Net Profit: 6,300,000; b) Current Assets: 13,000,000, Non-current Assets: 8,800,000, Total Assets: 21,800,000, Equity: 21,300,000, Current Liabilities: 3,000,000, Total Equity and Liabilities: 24,300,000

subQuestions.label: b)
subQuestions.text: Calculate the net profit margin for 2025

subQuestions.label: c)
subQuestions.text: Calculate the return on assets (ROA) for 2025

subQuestions.label: e)
subQuestions.text: Calculate the percentage increase in sales from 2024 to 2025
